title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 40.387 - Avoiding work, duty or service — court-martial
text:
40.387.  Avoiding work, duty or service — court-martial. — Any person subject to sections 40.005 to 40.490 shall be punished as a court-martial may direct who for the purpose of avoiding work, duty or service in the state military forces:
  (1)  Feigns illness, physical disablement, mental lapse or derangement; or
  (2)  Intentionally inflicts self-injury.
(L. 1984 H.B. 1035 § 113)
